---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A one-line description of the feature.

## Problem it solves
What use case or pain point does this address?
(e.g. "When cleaning up a NAS with 500K files, there is no way to...")

## Proposed solution
Describe what you want to happen. Be specific about:
- Which command it affects (`scan` / `duplicates` / `organize`)
- What the new flag or behavior would look like
- Example usage:
```bash
cleansweep ...
```

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought of and why you prefer this one.

## Invariant impact
Have you read `INVARIANTS.md`?
- [ ] Yes — this change does not violate any locked invariant
- [ ] Yes — this change would require an invariant change (explain below)
- [ ] Not yet

If an invariant is affected, explain which one and why the change is justified:

## Scope
- [ ] Minor (new flag, new option — backward compatible)
- [ ] Major (new command, architectural change, breaking change)

## Additional context
Any other details, references, or prior art from other tools.
